name: mem_infer
metric: max peak traced bytes across decode runs
score_tolerance_note: peak-memory metric has a ~60-byte pymalloc arena-boundary flicker; low-variance, not bit-exact (all other tasks are bit-exact, tolerance 0)
tolerant_metrics_note: only the peak-byte metric gets the score_tolerance on verify --rescore; invariant counts (n_instances, prompt_len, n_gen) must match exactly
